name: keycast
description: Keycast is a secure key management system for teams on Nostr.

scripts.dev: DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:password@localhost/keycast RUST_LOG=info,keycast_signer=debug MASTER_KEY_PATH=./master.key ENABLE_EXAMPLES=true cargo run --bin keycast
scripts.dev:watch: DATABASE_URL=postgres://postgres:password@localhost/keycast RUST_LOG=info,keycast_signer=debug MASTER_KEY_PATH=./master.key ENABLE_EXAMPLES=true cargo watch -x "run --bin keycast"
